subject: Our future
body:
Dear Jeffrey,
I am recovering now of two mayor issues, my things and our conversation.All I want to tell you is that we should try to make out of this the most positive situation. Count with me on evry aspect of this process. We will turn it arround.J.P.
________________________________________________________________________
Email and AIM finally together. You've gotta check out free AOL Mail! - http://mail.aol.com
